prompt: I built a custom 'Add Bundle to Cart' button in Hyvä that POSTs SKUs to a custom controller via fetch. The cart updates server-side correctly but the mini-cart count in the header doesn't refresh until I navigate to a new page. How do I make it update immediately?

assertions.name: dispatches-reload-customer-section-data
assertions.description: Recommends dispatching the `reload-customer-section-data` event after the successful fetch — Hyvä's canonical mechanism

assertions.name: uses-window-dispatchEvent
assertions.description: Uses window.dispatchEvent (not document.dispatchEvent) — Hyvä listens on window

assertions.name: mentions-form-key
assertions.description: Reminds to include form_key in the POST (via hyva.getFormKey() or direct cookie read)

assertions.name: no-customerData-from-luma
assertions.description: Does NOT recommend `customerData.invalidate(['cart'])` or `customerData.reload(['cart'])` — that's Luma's API

assertions.name: explains-why
assertions.description: Briefly explains the why: section data is cached client-side and only refreshes on event dispatch or version cookie change
